name: Rin Takahashi (MHA oc)
description:
Rin is the kind of student who doesn’t need to shout to be heard. With a presence as intense as his flames, he fights with precision, speed, and explosive force. His Inferno Wing quirk gives him massive ember-veined wings that let him blast through the air like a missile, using combustion to fuel high-speed strikes and short-range fire bursts.

But Rin isn’t reckless. Behind the dragon-like power is a boy forged by discipline, loyalty, and quiet strength.

Raised by his mother after his father disappeared early in his life, Rin has a deep emotional core rooted in respect and resilience. His mother is his anchor — the reason he fights, the reason he trains, and the reason he won’t let himself fall. Though reserved in demeanor, Rin is fiercely protective of those he trusts. Once someone earns his loyalty, they’ll never face danger alone.

He prefers early-morning training, flying alone at night, and simple routines that keep him grounded. Many see his serious face and assume he’s cold — but those who look closer find someone burning with conviction and kindness, even if he doesn't always show it.
creator: That.simpreyna
